name: Mashed Turnips
recipeInstructions:
1. Pare the turnips and cut into thin slices.
2. Cook in salted water in an uncovered pot for about 20 minutes, or until tender.
3. Drain well.
4. Press through a colander to remove excess liquid.
5. Return the mashed turnip mixture to the pot.
6. Add cream or butter and stir until smooth.
7. Season with salt if needed.
8. Serve immediately, sprinkling with paprika on top.
